entries.summary: Phase 1 completed — Project scaffold created: package.json, vite.config.js, main.js with window/network/clipboard, preload.js with contextBridge. Two bugs caught and fixed post-gate: electron-store was in devDependencies (runtime needed), and NODE_ENV string check replaced with app.isPackaged.
lessons_learned: electron-store is a runtime dependency of main process, must be in dependencies not devDependencies
process.env.NODE_ENV is unreliable in Electron — use app.isPackaged for production detection
Gate enforcement tool has hardcoded test_engineer requirement that doesn't respect TIER exemptions — had to delegate even for TIER 1 config files

entries.summary: Phase 1 (Project Scaffold) completed with package.json, vite.config.js, main.js, and preload.js all created and verified. Two integration bugs were caught post-gate: electron-store was initially placed in devDependencies instead of dependencies, and NODE_ENV-based production detection was replaced with the more reliable !app.isPackaged pattern. All Phase 1 deliverables have been validated.
lessons_learned: electron-store must be in dependencies (runtime), not devDependencies
!app.isPackaged is the reliable production detection in Electron — NODE_ENV is unreliable
Always verify coder claims with a follow-up read — the coder reported success but didn't actually write the file on first attempt
